name: query_logs
description: Queries structured operational logs for a given service and time range. Read-only. Does not expose credentials or secrets.

serviceName.description: The service ID to query logs for.

query.description: Log filter expression (no credentials or secrets).

name: get_runbook
description: Retrieves the full content of a runbook by ID. Read-only knowledge retrieval.

name: create_incident
description: Creates a new incident record in the incident management system. Does not execute any remediation.

name: escalate_incident
description: Triggers the escalation policy for a given incident, paging the next on-call level. Requires approval for escalation beyond L2.

name: execute_remediation
description: Executes a pre-approved remediation action (e.g., rollback or restart). This is a high-risk, approval-gated capability. The agent MUST obtain explicit human approval before execution.

remediationActionId.description: The remediation action to execute (e.g., remediation-rollback-deployment).

targetVersion.description: For rollbacks: the version to roll back to.

approvalTicketId.description: Required: the approval ticket ID from the AKCP approval flow.
